channel.title: API Design on Alexey Evlampiev
channel.description: Recent content in API Design on Alexey Evlampiev

item.title: Freshness Isn't the Only Axis: APIs, Projections, and Federated Queries
item.description: Freshness is one requirement. Evaluate calls, projections, and federated queries across eight dimensions, including coherence, semantics, authority, and recovery.
